note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface module functions.

methods.name: element_find
methods.description: Get interface element with given ID number.

methods.name: elements
methods.description: Get an interface element interator object.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the interface extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the interface group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: interface.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the interface. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this interface is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: interface.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the interface is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: node_find
methods.description: Get interface node with given ID number.

methods.name: nodes
methods.description: Get an interface node iterator object.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the interface extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: interface.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the interface group name in a given slot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this interface is live.
